NUMEROUS REPORTS OF TORNADO NEAR PROWERS AND BACA COUNTY LINE NORTHEAST OF TWO BUTTES. TORNADO HAS BEEN ON GROUND FOR AT LEAST 20 MINUTES.

THUNDERSTORM WINDS KNOCKED SEVERAL TREE LIMBS DOWN AS WELL AS AN APPROXIMATELY 15 FOOT TALL PINE TREE. IN ADDITION, A FLAG POLE WAS KNOCKED DOWN AS WELL AS SOME WOODEN FENCES. FINALLY, THE THUNDERSTORM WINDS ALSO BUCKLED A GARAGE DOOR.

A SEVERE THUNDERSTORM PRODUCED ZERO VISIBILTY FOR APPROXIMATELY 15 MINUTES...WIND EQUIPMENT BROKE AT 59 MPH...PARTIALLY DEAD TREE THROWN APPROXIMATELY 20 FEET WITH THUNDERSTORM WINDS AS WELL AS NUMEROUS SMALL OBJECTS THROWN AROUND.
3 SECTIONS OF WOODEN FENCE BLOWN DOWN...PARTS OF SIDING TORN...AND OTHER EXTERIOR DAMAGE.
